inputs.fcf_source: FY2026 (ended 2026-01-31): cash from operations $2,939M minus capital spending $162M, divided by 268.1M diluted shares (10-K FY2026)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence uses reported free cash flow; stock-based compensation $1,626M is already a non-cash add-back in cash from operations

bear.notes: HCM/finance competition from Oracle and SAP caps net-new logos; operating margin stalls near 8%; multiple compresses

base.notes: RPO $28.1B supports double-digit subscription growth; Illuminate AI embedded in renewals; buybacks offset dilution

bull.notes: AI upsell lifts ARPU; finance cloud share gains versus legacy ERP; sustained $2B+ annual repurchases

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light subscription software; equity investments $924M at fair value (10-K FY2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: RPO $28.1B; ~31% expected within 12 months — modeled via subscription growth, not separate terminal (10-K FY2026)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single profitable operating segment; consolidated operating margin 7.5% FY2026, expanding

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AI features embedded in HCM and Financials renewals — growth in base scenario

option_scan.question: Material separate options after scan?
option_scan.answer: No dated NAV or binary bets
option_scan.evidence: Acquisition intangibles ($681M) amortize in segment; no disclosed fair-value marks on in-business AI options

growth_explanation.mechanism: Subscription RPO ($28.1B) converts to recognized revenue; HCM and Financial Management upsell on unified data model; Illuminate AI and platform extensions raise renewal rates; capital returns via buybacks

falsifiers.observation: RPO growth falls below subscription revenue growth for two consecutive quarters
Operating margin fails to expand despite revenue growth in two consecutive 10-Q filings
falsifiers.action: Cap exit multiple at 22x; downgrade moat to eroding
